response.overview: A struggling construction worker caring for his disabled mother and terminally ill younger brother is pushed to the edge after a devastating family tragedy. Desperate for money and haunted by guilt, he is drawn into a mysterious underground organization that offers him a chance to change his fate. What begins as a simple test soon becomes a deadly fight for survival, forcing him to confront his past, his rage, and the true cost of entering a world built on violence.
response.title: Crimson Roulette
